title: GTI VirusTotal Threat Intelligence
description: This dashboard provides an overview of logs that matched IOCs identified through GTI VirusTotal Threat Intelligence.

definition.content:
[GTI VirusTotal](https://www.virustotal.com/gui/home/search) acting as a massive crowdsourced repository for threat data. It enables security teams to analyze suspicious files, URLs, domains, and IP addresses to detect malware and other threats by aggregating input from multiple security vendors.


This dashboard provides an overview of logs that matched IOCs identified through GTI VirusTotal Threat Intelligence.

For more information, see the [GTI VirusTotal Datadog Integration Documentation](https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/gti_virustotal/).

**Tips**
- Use the timeframe selector in the top right of the dashboard to change the default timeframe.
- Clone this dashboard to rearrange, modify and add widgets and visualizations.

This group provides visibility into logs enriched with matched IOCs, highlighting IOC trends, types, severity, intention, and geographic distribution. It also surfaces malicious, suspicious, and harmless report counts, along with categories, tags, and frequently matched indicators.

definition.title: Logs with matched IOCs over time
IOCs matched over time by type
Distribution of matched IOCs by type
Average malicious report count for matched IOCs
Average suspicious report count for matched IOCs

Distribution of matched IOCs by severity
Distribution of matched IOCs by intention
Distribution of matched IP IOCs by country

definition.content: Datadog Cloud SIEM analyzes and correlates logs identified malicious by GTI VirusTotal to detect threats to your environment in real time. If you don't see signals please make sure you've enabled [Datadog Cloud SIEM](/security/siem/home).
